title: Projects
description: Manage your projects and their execution environments

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project to start managing your teams

form.projectColorHint: Choose a color to visually identify this project
form.gitUrlHintWithEnvs: Optional. If provided, environments will be cloned from this repository. Otherwise, empty directories with a local git repo will be created.
form.basePathHint: Base directory where environments will be created. Each environment will be placed in a subfolder (plan, dev, staging).
form.gitTokenHint: Optional. Personal access token for cloning private repositories. If omitted, the system will use gh CLI credentials or the GIT_TOKEN environment variable.

delete.title: Delete Project
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete project "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

defaultAgents.title: Create Default Teams
defaultAgents.description: You can create default teams to get started quickly. The planner team is essential for the pipeline workflow to function correctly.

coder.label: Coder Team
coder.description: Implements features and fixes following project patterns

planner.label: Planner Team
planner.description: Plans and breaks down tasks into executable workflows. Required for pipeline operations.

environments.title: Environments
environments.empty: No environments yet. Create one to get started.

agents.title: Teams
agents.empty: No teams yet. Use the Teams page to create teams for this project.

repair.title: Repair teams for "{{name}}"?
repair.description:
This will:
• Create missing plan/dev/staging environments
• Bootstrap default teams (Plan Team, Dev Team, Staging Team)
• Generate CLAUDE.md and settings for each team
